raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Personal declaration of willingness and readiness in a spiritual self-improvement context",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "The speaker possesses identifiable defects of character",
    "A God or higher power exists and can remove such defects",
    "The speaker has reached a state of complete readiness for this removal",
    "Such removal is desirable and beneficial"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent as a theistic affirmation of surrender; assumes shared premises of a higher power and personal flaws without internal contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The individual must accept theistic premises, believe the declaration promotes genuine character change, and apply it within a supportive recovery framework",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "If presented as an objective fact rather than subjective commitment, or if it implies divine intervention alone suffices without personal agency"
}
